title: CustodianEvent
description: A class to specify the Custodian Event.

isApplicable.description: The qualification as to whether the Custodian Event (English Law & New York Law ISDA CSA) or the Collateral Manager Event (Japanese Law ISDA CSA) is applicable.

endDate.description: The qualification of the Custodian Event (English Law & New York Law ISDA CSA) or Collateral Manager Event (Japanese Law ISDA CSA) End Date.
